Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Korr]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 1''' — Korr provided a warning to Indirial.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 1''' — Korr is a presence that can whisper to Indirial.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 1''' — Korr resides inside Indirial.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 17''' — Korr is an advisor residing inside a black gem in Indirial's medallion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 17''' — Korr provides warnings via a violet flame in the corner of one's vision.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 17''' — Korr whispered into Indirial's mind about the danger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 20''' — Korr can be summoned from Valinhall to appear on a gold chain around Indirial's neck.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 20''' — Korr can perceive danger and sees violet flame on the end of Zakareth's spear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — Indirial has Korr dangling from his neck.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 23''' — Korr provides warnings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 23''' — Korr's warning is associated with violet flame.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
